title: cachrys scabra
intro: Cachrys scabra, also known as Prangos scabra, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Cachrys scabra include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Cachrys scabra is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with the dried roots and rhizomes being used to make herbal preparations that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
